# Design Styles Reference

Practical guide for **commercial UI design** with 50 design aesthetics for creating visually distinctive work.

## When to Use

- Creating professional B2B interfaces
- Designing clean, commercial dashboards
- Extracting color palettes for enterprise apps
- Guidance on typography and spacing systems
- Accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA)

## Quick Commercial Patterns

### Enterprise Color System
- Blue-600 (#2563eb) for primary actions
- Gray-900 for body text, gray-600 for secondary
- Status: green (success), yellow (warning), red (error)

### Typography for Dashboards
- Base: 16px with relaxed leading
- Headings: semibold, gray-900
- Labels: small, uppercase tracking

### Data Table Essentials
- Fixed header on scroll
- Alternating row colors
- Clear hover and selection states
- Empty state with action

### Loading States
- Skeleton rows matching table structure
- 150-300ms transitions max
- Respect prefers-reduced-motion

## 50 Design Aesthetics Index

| # | Style | Category | When to Use |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Swiss Style | Classic | Clean, professional dashboards |
| 7 | Minimalism | Classic | Enterprise B2B interfaces |
| 17 | Synthwave | Retro | Optional accent theme |
| 31 | Cyberpunk | Digital | Dark mode variant |
| 35 | Tech Spec | Digital | System/data displays |

Full reference available in original 50-style documentation for visual inspiration when needed.
